'''Ulqib MicroTronics''' was an electronics and custom programming company. The company did not generally manufacture goods, instead analyzing the products of other companies and then producing kits and computer programs. This allowed customers to customize their purchases, such as [[Droid/Legends|droids]], [[Computer/Legends|computers]], or even automated machinery, to function at maximum utility and efficiency. Ulqib was one of the [[contributing sponsor]]s to the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].<ref name="HSCS" /> The company's products included the [[BX-333 Biorecorder]] and the [[droid customization kit]].<ref name="GFT" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'' originally identified the company as Ulqib ''Macro''Tronics. Later mentions in the ''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]'' and the ''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]'' changed the name to Ulqib ''Micro''Tronics.
